name: Deep Research MCP Server
what_it_does: Deep Research MCP server enabling AI agents to perform multi-step research workflows — conducting iterative web searches, synthesizing information from multiple sources, generating research reports with citations, and producing comprehensive analysis on topics by combining search APIs (Brave, Perplexity, or OpenAI) with structured reasoning to go deeper than single-query searches.
use_cases: Conducting comprehensive research reports on topics from analysis agents
Multi-step investigative research with source verification from research agents
Competitive analysis with iterative web research from business intelligence agents
Technical deep-dives gathering information from multiple sources from engineering agents
Background research for content creation from writing agents
Due diligence research combining multiple information sources from evaluation agents
not_for: Simple single-query searches (use basic search MCPs for quick lookups)
Real-time data monitoring (deep research is for periodic comprehensive analysis)
Teams without search API keys (Brave, Perplexity, or OpenAI required)
best_when: An agent needs to conduct thorough, multi-step research on a topic — going beyond single searches to synthesize information from many sources into a comprehensive report.
avoid_when: You need quick single-query answers or real-time data — use simple search MCPs for lightweight lookups.

auth.notes: Search API key required (Brave Search API, Perplexity API, or OpenAI API). Configure based on which search backend is used. Each call may consume multiple API credits for multi-step research.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Search API dependent: Brave 2,000 queries/month free; Perplexity has free tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Search API pricing per query; deep research uses multiple queries per call
pricing.notes: MCP server is free. Deep research workflows consume multiple API credits per research session — budget carefully.

performance.rate_limits: Research API dependent; multi-step research amplifies rate limit consumption

known_agent_gotchas: Multi-step research uses many API credits per call — expensive for large research tasks
Research latency can be 30-60 seconds for thorough multi-source synthesis
Research quality varies by topic — niche or technical topics may have limited web coverage
Citations and source quality depend on what web search returns — verify important claims
Community MCP — deep research prompting strategies evolve; may need tuning
Each search provider has different strengths — choose backend based on research domain
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key for search provider — store as environment variable. Web content ingested from public sources. No user data stored. Community MCP.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key auth. Public web sources only. Store key as env var. Community MCP.
